name: Firehouse Special
recipeIngredient: 2 cans condensed cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and onion in oil over medium heat until thoroughly cooked. Stir to crumble the meat.
2. Combine the condensed cream of celery soup and milk in a saucepan. Cook, stirring, over medium heat until smooth. Add the diced green chiles.
3. Arrange half of the tortilla squares on the bottom of a baking dish. Spread with half of the cooked beef mixture, followed by half of the soup mixture and half of the shredded cheese.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Bake at 325°F for 20 to 30 minutes until heated through.
